name: worker-aid-agent
description: Open-source AI agents and skills for Chinese workers' rights self-help, evidence organization, and legal-aid preparation.

scripts.demo: node src/worker-aid-cli.mjs classify examples/case-wage-arrears.json && node src/worker-aid-cli.mjs checklist wage_arrears && node src/worker-aid-cli.mjs overtime examples/overtime-input.json
